parsed.anchor_rejected_above: Anchor 4 (Well-modularized) does not match because: (a) services call raw `db.prepare(...)` directly throughout loanService.ts (e.g., `const memberStmt = db.prepare('SELECT status FROM members WHERE id = ?');`) rather than going through a thin DB-access abstraction; (b) the frontend is organized by technical role (`components/`, `hooks/`, `pages/`, `types/`) — not by feature (no `checkout/`, `members/`, `books/` feature folders); (c) shared types are duplicated — frontend/src/types/index.ts redeclares `Loan`, `LoanWithBook`, `Book`, `Member` etc. that already exist in the backend services (e.g., `loanService.ts` exports its own `Loan` and `LoanWithBook`), with no shared workspace or generated client.
